reminders.message: Hello Abraham Mulondo, this is a reminder from Kampala Community Pharmacy. Your medication for Metformin will run out on 2026-06-14. Please visit us for your refill. Thank you.

Dear John Mugisha, as a friendly reminder from Kampala Community Pharmacy, your HIV/ARVs treatment Acriptega (TLD) is due on 2026-06-12. Regular adherence is key to your health. We have packages ready for pickup.
Hello John Mugisha. Plot 42 reminder: Your Acriptega (TLD) prescription is refilling in 3 days (June 12). Drop by Kampala Community Pharmacy or call us for delivery details.

pharm-001.Hypertension: Hello {patient_name}, this is private reminder from {pharmacy_name}. Your medication for {med_name} will run out on {next_refill_date}. Please visit Plot 42 or call +256 701 123456 to arrange pick-up. Stay healthy!
pharm-001.Diabetes: Dear {patient_name}, this is {pharmacy_name}. Your {med_name} refill is due on {next_refill_date}. We have pre-packed your dosage. Please stop by or call us if you need help with transport. Thank you.
pharm-001.HIV/ARVs: Dear {patient_name}, friendly reminder from {pharmacy_name}. Your wellness package for {med_name} is ready for pick-up on {next_refill_date}. Thank you for trusting Kampala Community Pharmacy with your health support.
pharm-001.General: Hello {patient_name}, your chronic medication {med_name} from {pharmacy_name} will run out on {next_refill_date}. Please stop by for your refill. Thank you.

pharm-002.Hypertension: Amlodipine/Losartan reminder for {patient_name} from {pharmacy_name}. Next refill date is {next_refill_date}. Please visit our branch on Gulu-Arua Road.
pharm-002.Diabetes: Hello {patient_name}, your diabetes refill {med_name} at {pharmacy_name} is due on {next_refill_date}. Let us help you stay in control of your blood sugar.
pharm-002.HIV/ARVs: {patient_name}, friendly health reminder from {pharmacy_name} for medication {med_name} due {next_refill_date}. We open from 8:00 AM to 8:30 PM.
pharm-002.General: Hello {patient_name}, please recuer to refill {med_name} on or before {next_refill_date} at {pharmacy_name}.

pharm-003.Hypertension: Hello {patient_name}, please remember your Hypertension refill of {med_name} at Elgon Wellness Mbale on {next_refill_date}.
pharm-003.Diabetes: Refill notice: {patient_name}, your {med_name} at Elgon Chemists Mbale is due {next_refill_date}.
pharm-003.HIV/ARVs: Wellness reminder for {patient_name}. Your medication {med_name} from Elgon Chemistry Mbale is due on {next_refill_date}.
pharm-003.General: Medication Refill alert for {patient_name}: {med_name} refill date {next_refill_date} at Elgon Chemists.
